summary: Iteration 24: P0 Features Testing - Owner Dashboard View Switcher, Owner People & Ops Drill-down, Manager Guests Sorted by Spend with Profile Modal. All features PASS.

login_teste_teste_com.description: Login with teste@teste.com / 12345 works, redirects to /venue/home

owner_dashboard_view_switcher.description: View switcher shows Business Overview / By Venue / By Event tabs. All three views load correctly with data-testid selectors.

owner_dashboard_business_view.description: GET /api/owner/dashboard?view=business returns KPIs (revenue_today, revenue_mtd, revenue_ytd, growth_pct, etc.)

owner_dashboard_venue_view.description: GET /api/owner/dashboard?view=venue returns per-venue financials (revenue_today, revenue_mtd, revenue_ytd, avg_ticket, staff_count)

owner_dashboard_events_view.description: GET /api/owner/dashboard?view=events returns per-event data (revenue, tabs_closed, guests, staff)

owner_people_ops_section.description: GET /api/owner/people returns venues and events with staff counts. Shows 'BY VENUE' and 'BY EVENT' sections with clickable cards.

owner_venue_drilldown_modal.description: Clicking venue card opens drill-down modal showing 3 staff members. GET /api/owner/people/{venue_id}/staff works.

owner_event_drilldown_modal.description: Clicking event card opens drill-down modal showing assigned staff. GET /api/owner/people/event/{event_id}/staff works.

owner_drilldown_close_button.description: Drill-down modal closes with X button (data-testid='close-drilldown')

manager_guests_sorted_by_spend.description: GET /api/manager/guests returns guests sorted by spend_total desc. UI shows 'sorted by highest spender' and displays $450, $180, $90, $0

manager_guest_profile_modal.description: Clicking guest row opens profile modal with spend summary (total_spend, total_sessions, avg_spend), event history, and recent tabs

manager_guest_profile_close.description: Guest profile modal closes with X button (data-testid='close-guest-modal')

api_owner_dashboard_business.description: API GET /api/owner/dashboard?view=business returns 200 with correct structure

api_owner_dashboard_venue.description: API GET /api/owner/dashboard?view=venue returns 200 with per-venue financials

api_owner_dashboard_events.description: API GET /api/owner/dashboard?view=events returns 200 with per-event data

api_owner_people.description: API GET /api/owner/people returns 200 with venues and events arrays

api_owner_venue_staff.description: API GET /api/owner/people/{venue_id}/staff returns 200 with staff list

api_owner_event_staff.description: API GET /api/owner/people/event/{event_id}/staff returns 200 with event staff

api_manager_guests.description: API GET /api/manager/guests returns 200 with guests sorted by spend_total desc

api_manager_guest_detail.description: API GET /api/manager/guests/{guest_id} returns 200 with spend_summary, entries, sessions, events

seed_data_used.guests: 4 guests in DB: John Smith ($450 VIP), Maria Lopez ($180), Kevin Brown (Blocked, $90), Juliano ($0)
seed_data_used.staff: 3 operational staff at Demo Club Updated venue
seed_data_used.events: Multiple test events including TEST_Wizard_Event_2026-02-27 (3 staff), Test Event (1 staff)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 24 P0 features fully verified: (1) Owner Dashboard has view switcher with Business Overview / By Venue / By Event tabs - all working. (2) Owner People & Ops shows BY VENUE and BY EVENT sections with clickable cards that open drill-down modals showing staff members. Close button works. (3) Manager Dashboard Guests tab shows guests sorted by highest spender (descending by spend_total). Clicking guest row opens profile modal with spend_summary (total_spend, total_sessions, avg_spend), event history, and recent tabs. All APIs return correct data structures. UI data-testid attributes are properly set for automated testing.
